message:
fix(clippy): address additional clippy warnings in pt-core

- network.rs: Use enumerate() for counter loop, use flatten() instead of
  manual if-let on iterator
- composite_test.rs: Remove redundant if with identical branches
- dependency_loss.rs: Remove unnecessary clone on Copy type
- load_aware.rs: Use first() instead of get(0), use map instead of and_then
  with Some
- robot_constraints.rs: Replace manual Default impl with derive
- voi.rs: Collapse else-if block
- belief_prop.rs: Remove redundant closure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
